iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 29% (up). Day 24 (18:00 UTC) — CRITICAL (UPGRADE). Projectile hit Bushehr nuclear plant premises (Tue evening) — IAEA confirms, no damage/injuries but unprecedented targeting of nuclear facility. IAEA cannot access new underground enrichment facility at Isfahan — unknown status. Iran still has 60% HEU stockpile (10-11 weapons capability). Grossi: "does not know status" of Isfahan facility. Bushehr strike + IAEA access denial = nuclear escalation. Regime under extreme pressure from leadership decapitation — nuclear threshold risk increasing.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 24 (18:00 UTC) — IMMINENT (UP). IRGC launches multi-warhead missiles + cluster munitions at central Israel in retaliation for Larijani killing. Iran strikes Saudi Eastern Province oil fields. US Embassy Baghdad hit by explosive drones again. Projectile near Australian base in UAE. Booms in Doha. Oil $108-110/barrel. Iran death toll ~1,500. 100+ Israeli targets claimed hit. Katz promises "significant surprises." Energy war now fully two-sided — both Israel/US hitting South Pars AND Iran hitting Gulf oil infrastructure. Trump eases Venezuela sanctions to offset supply. No ceasefire signals. Hormuz remains near-impassable. UK says reopening "a long way off."

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 24 (18:00 UTC) — IMMINENT. IDF strikes Litani River bridges, 2nd division deployed. 6 killed in central Beirut strike. Katz promises "significant surprises." 1M+ displaced. Litani invasion push ongoing. Bourj Hammoud apartment hit. No ceasefire signals. Geographic expansion continues.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 14% (stable). Day 24 (18:00 UTC) — DETERRENT. Previous 3 Iranian missile intercepts over Turkey. Incirlik vicinity targeted. Turkey mediating Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire. Stable. No new Turkey-specific escalation signals.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 12% (stable). Day 24 (18:00 UTC) — DETERRENT. India evacuating nationals from ME. No new India-Pakistan military signals. Stable.

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 10% (stable). Day 24 (18:00 UTC) — DETERRENT. Arms supply to Iran ongoing. Intelligence sharing expanded. Putin-Trump call today — Ukraine focus, not ME intervention. No direct ME military involvement. Russia benefiting from oil price shock. Stable.

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 6% (stable). Day 24 (18:00 UTC) — DETERRENT. Status quo. Trump-Xi summit pending. China engaged diplomatically. No PLA activity changes. Stable.

north_korea.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 24 (18:00 UTC) — DETERRENT. Extended quiet. No verified signals. Stable.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 51% (stable). Day 24 (18:00 UTC) — CRITICAL. Putin-Trump call TODAY on Ukraine. Russia ready for Geneva negotiations. Lavrov pre-rejects any settlement without full territorial concessions. Finnish President Stubb calls for Ukraine territorial concessions. Putin holds Crimea meeting. Oil revenue boost from Iran war reduces Moscow economic pressure. Peace talks stalled — Iran war consumes US bandwidth. Status quo grinding conflict with diplomatic overture underway but low prospects.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 51% (down). Day 24 (18:00 UTC) — CRITICAL but DECLINING. Both Pakistan and Afghanistan agree to 5-day Eid ceasefire starting tonight (March 18-19). Mediated by Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Turkey. Pakistan calls it pause in "Operation Ghazab Lil Haq." Afghanistan reciprocates. First bilateral de-escalation since war began. However, underlying conflict unresolved — Kabul hospital death toll 40+. Ceasefire is religious/diplomatic, not structural. Watch post-Eid for resumption. open_war_declared signal remains active (no formal peace, only pause).

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: SIGNAL: Iran easing Hormuz restrictions per maritime data — countries cutting individual deals instead of joining US coalition. This is a partial de-escalation on the economic front, though military strikes continue. Europe refuses Hormuz naval deployment. Putin-Trump call today is the key diplomatic variable for Ukraine. Zero ceasefire signals in ME active theaters.

latest_news.headline: Projectile strikes Bushehr nuclear plant premises — IAEA confirms, no damage
latest_news.text: Iran informed IAEA that projectile hit Bushehr NPP premises Tuesday evening. No damage or injuries reported. Russia confirms strike. Unprecedented targeting of operating nuclear facility. Radiological incident averted but raises nuclear escalation risk.

latest_news.headline: IAEA does not know status of new Isfahan underground enrichment facility
latest_news.text: IAEA chief Grossi says agency 'does not know status' of new Iranian enrichment facility in underground Isfahan complex. Iran blocked inspectors since June war. Intelligence suggests hidden HEU stockpile.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan and Afghanistan agree to 5-day Eid ceasefire
latest_news.text: Both sides announce 5-day pause in hostilities for Eid al-Fitr, at request of Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Turkey. Pakistan calls it pause in Operation Ghazab Lil Haq. Afghanistan reciprocates. First bilateral de-escalation since conflict began.

latest_news.headline: IRGC launches multi-warhead missiles + cluster munitions at Israel
latest_news.text: IRGC claims strikes on 100+ Israeli targets using multi-warhead missiles designed to evade defense systems. AP footage shows cluster munitions releasing over Israel. 2 killed in Ramat Gan. Retaliation for Larijani assassination.

latest_news.headline: Iran strikes Saudi Eastern Province oil fields
latest_news.text: Iran attacks Saudi Arabia's Eastern Province, home to many of its oil fields. Part of broader strikes on Gulf energy infrastructure. Oil surges to $108-110/barrel.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 24, 17:04 UTC) — (1) PAKISTAN PAUSES STRIKES on Afghanistan for Eid — first de-escalation signal; (2) IRGC threatens Gulf energy assets 'in coming hours' — Qatar, Saudi, UAE oil/gas infrastructure; (3) South Pars struck, Qatar condemns; (4) IDF hits Litani River bridges, 2nd division in Lebanon; (5) Oil ~$110/barrel. Pakistan-Afghanistan trend shifting down but conflict unresolved. Iran-Gulf remains the hottest front — IRGC explicitly targeting Gulf state energy infrastructure.
